summary: Shifted the opening away from a room-arrival scaffold to a table-action entry and tightened the closing beat so chapter 14's continued packet review follows more cleanly.
edits: Rewrote the opening paragraph to start on Leela setting down the coffees while preserving the same scene information and tone.
Trimmed the immediately following setup sentence to remove duplicated coffee and wrist-brace detail after the new opening.
Adjusted the final line to make clear that sending the grievance did not make the matter feel finished.
